methodology_sections: 1.1 Asset Inventory - Financial assets, state assets, privilege assets, reputation assets
1.3 System Architecture Mapping - Contract hierarchies, dependencies, upgrade patterns, access control
2.1 Entry Point Enumeration - Public/external functions, callbacks, parameter analysis

financial_assets: ERC20 underlying tokens held by each LendingPool (cash accounting; borrower repayments; lender deposits)
LendingPool share tokens (ERC20Upgradeable) minted/burned as receipt shares; transferable value
Debt positions represented as debtShares in PosManager and pool totalDebtShares
ETH/WNATIVE flows in MarginTradingHook and MoneyMarketHook (depositNative/refundNative patterns)
Position NFTs (ERC721) minted by PosManager representing ownership/authorization of leveraged/lending positions
Wrapped LP NFTs (WLpMoeMasterChef ERC721Upgradeable) representing staked LP positions in MasterChef; underlying LP tokens deposited into MasterChef
Reward tokens (MOE and potential extra reward token) accrued in WLpMoeMasterChef and transferred to users/to PosManager pending rewards
Protocol reserves minted to treasury in LendingPool.accrueInterest via reserveFactor
Flashloan amounts temporarily transferred from pools to borrower in InitCore.flash (pool->borrower via transferFrom allowance)
Margin order execution flows in MarginTradingHook.fillOrder: executor provides repay tokens and tokenOut to recipient; collateral shares transferred to executor
state_assets: InitCore: config/oracle/liqIncentiveCalculator/riskManager addresses; isMulticallTx flag; uncheckedPosIds set (post-multicall health enforcement)
Config: pool configs (caps/pauses/flash), mode configs (allowed collateral/borrow sets), token factors, max health after liq, max wLp count, whitelistedWLps
LendingPool: underlyingToken, cash, totalDebt, totalDebtShares, lastAccruedTime, irm, reserveFactor_e18, treasury

PosManager: position info (owner via ERC721), pos mode, viewer mapping (__viewerPosIds), collateral balances by pool, collateral sets/counts, wLp collateral sets/counts, debtShares per pool, interest accounting snapshots (totalInterest/lastDebtAmt), pendingRewards per position/token, isCollateralized flags

MarginTradingHook: swapHelper, quote-asset mapping for pairs, marginPositions per initPosId, orders storage, pos->orderIds index, lastOrderId, user posId<->initPosId mapping (inherited BaseMappingIdHook)
MoneyMarketHook: user posId<->initPosId mapping, whitelisted rebase helpers
RiskManager: per-mode per-pool debt ceiling info (debtShares, ceilAmt)
WLpMoeMasterChef: lps[id], __lpBalances[id], pids[id], reward token set per pid, global pidAccRewardPerShares, per-id idAccRewardPerShares, lastId
Api3OracleReader: api3ServerV1 address; dataFeedInfos (id, maxStaleTime) per token
privilege_assets: AccessControlManager default admin authority (OZ AccessControlDefaultAdminRules) controls granting/revoking roles used system-wide
Roles enforced via ACM.checkRole: GOVERNOR (system config/oracle/quote assets/liquidation params), GUARDIAN (risk params, pausing, IRM, debt ceilings, helper whitelists)
InitCore: onlyGovernor can change config/oracle; onlyGuardian can change riskManager/liqIncentiveCalculator
LendingPool: onlyGuardian can set irm and reserveFactor; onlyGovernor can set treasury
Config: onlyGuardian can set pool config, mode status, max health after liq, max wLp count; onlyGovernor can set factors and whitelist wLps
InitOracle: onlyGovernor can set sources and max deviations
RiskManager: onlyGuardian sets ceilings; onlyCore updates debt shares
PosManager: onlyGuardian sets maxCollCount; onlyCore mutates collateral/debt/mode and mints positions
MarginTradingHook: onlyGovernor can setQuoteAsset; swapHelper set via initialize()
reputation_assets: Protocol solvency and lender trust driven by oracle correctness (InitOracle + underlying sources) and health-factor enforcement (InitCore multicall health checks)
Governance/admin reputation: correctness of role assignments in AccessControlManager and safe upgrades via TransparentUpgradeableProxy
Margin order execution fairness/MEV resistance (fillOrder conditions, trigger price validation, limit price assumptions)
Reward distribution correctness for staked LP collateral (WLpMoeMasterChef accounting + PosManager pendingRewards)

system_architecture.inheritance_hierarchy: MarginTradingHook <- BaseMappingIdHook (ERC721HolderUpgradeable) + UnderACM; implements IMarginTradingHook, ICallbackReceiver. MoneyMarketHook <- ERC721HolderUpgradeable + ReentrancyGuardUpgradeable + UnderACM. InitCore <- Multicall + ReentrancyGuardUpgradeable + UnderACM. PosManager <- UnderACM + ERC721EnumerableUpgradeable + ERC721HolderUpgradeable. LendingPool <- ERC20Upgradeable + UnderACM. Config/InitOracle/LiqIncentiveCalculator/RiskManager/Api3OracleReader <- UnderACM + Initializable. WLpMoeMasterChef <- ERC721Upgradeable + IWrapLpERC20Upgradeable. TransparentUpgradeableProxyReceiveETH <- OZ TransparentUpgradeableProxy. AccessControlManager <- OZ AccessControlDefaultAdminRules.
external_dependencies: OpenZeppelin upgradeable: Initializable, ReentrancyGuardUpgradeable, ERC20Upgradeable, ERC721Upgradeable, ERC721EnumerableUpgradeable, ERC721HolderUpgradeable
OpenZeppelin non-upgradeable: TransparentUpgradeableProxy, AccessControlDefaultAdminRules, SafeERC20, Math/MathUpgradeable, EnumerableSet, SafeCast, IERC20/IERC20Metadata, IERC721
External protocol integrations: Merchant Moe MasterChef (IMasterChef, IMasterChefRewarder), Moe Router (IMoeRouter), Moe Pair/Factory (IMoePair/IMoeFactory)
Oracle sources via IBaseOracle interface (e.g., Api3OracleReader as one possible source)
system_architecture.upgrade_patterns: Multiple contracts are upgradeable implementations (Initializable + _disableInitializers in constructor) intended to be deployed behind TransparentUpgradeableProxy (see TransparentUpgradeableProxyReceiveETH). No UUPS/Diamond present in provided code. Some contracts are non-upgradeable with immutables (DoubleSlopeIRM, MoeSwapHelper).
system_architecture.access_control_structure: Centralized role checks delegated to immutable ACM (AccessControlManager) via ACM.checkRole(role,user). Roles used: governor and guardian across modules. Position-level authorization: InitCore.onlyAuthorized uses PosManager.isAuthorized(msg.sender,posId) (ERC721 owner/approval). PosManager.onlyCore restricts core mutations. LendingPool.onlyCore restricts mint/burn/borrow/repay to InitCore. MoneyMarketHook enforces that it (the hook) owns the underlying position NFT for mapped initPosId when executing existing positions.
integration_points_with_other_protocols: InitCore.flash relies on LendingPool approving core for underlying token to allow safeTransferFrom(pool, borrower, amt)
MarginTradingHook uses InitCore.multicall and InitCore.callback to perform swaps via external swapHelper (e.g., MoeSwapHelper) and then continues core ops
WLpMoeMasterChef stakes LP into Merchant Moe MasterChef and harvests reward tokens (MOE + optional extra reward token) and transfers to user/PosManager
InitOracle composes prices from primary/secondary oracle sources implementing IBaseOracle (e.g., Api3OracleReader)
MoneyMarketHook can integrate with rebase helpers (IRebaseHelper) that wrap/unwrap rebasing assets

entry_points.function: openPos(uint16 _mode, address _viewer, address _tokenIn, uint256 _amtIn, address _borrPool, uint256 _borrAmt, address _collPool, bytes _data, uint256 _minHealth_e18)
increasePos(uint256 _posId, address _tokenIn, uint256 _amtIn, uint256 _borrAmt, bytes _data, uint256 _minHealth_e18)
reducePos(uint256 _posId, uint256 _collAmt, uint256 _repayShares, address _tokenOut, uint256 _minAmtOut, bool _returnNative, bytes _data, uint256 _minHealth_e18)
updateOrder(uint256 _posId, uint256 _orderId, uint256 _triggerPrice_e36, address _tokenOut, uint256 _limitPrice_e36, uint256 _collAmt)
liquidateWLp(uint256 _posId, address _poolToRepay, uint256 _repayShares, address _wLp, uint256 _tokenId, uint256 _minlpOut)
execute((uint256 posId,uint16 mode,address viewer,(tuple)[] depositParams,(tuple)[] withdrawParams,(tuple)[] borrowParams,(tuple)[] repayParams,uint256 minHealth_e18,bool returnNative) _params)
external_calls: IERC721(POS_MANAGER).ownerOf (ownership check: hook must own initPosId for existing mapping)

entry_points.function: initialize(address _underlyingToken, string _name, string _symbol, address _irm, uint256 _reserveFactor_e18, address _treasury)
setPoolConfig(address _pool, (bool canMint,bool canBurn,bool canBorrow,bool canRepay,bool canFlash,uint256 supplyCap,uint256 borrowCap) _config)
swap((uint256 initPosId,uint8 swapType,address tokenIn,address tokenOut,uint256 amtOut,bytes data) _swapInfo)

upgradeability_surface.notes: Proxy includes receive() to accept ETH. Admin/implementation management inherited from OZ TransparentUpgradeableProxy.

Upgradeable implementation with storage variables and immutables. Uses OZ ReentrancyGuardUpgradeable + custom Multicall with delegatecall; ensure proxy admin cannot call implementation functions accidentally. Constructor disables initializers.
ERC20Upgradeable pool share token. Constructor disables initializers; approves core max for flash.
Config storage only. Constructor disables initializers.
Oracle registry contract; constructor disables initializers.
Parameter storage only; constructor disables initializers.
Debt ceiling storage; only core can update debt shares; constructor disables initializers.
Hook holds ETH/WNATIVE and performs external calls to helpers; constructor disables initializers.
Hook relies on TransparentUpgradeableProxyReceiveETH for ETH receive during WNATIVE withdraw. Ensure initialize(swapHelper) is called exactly once and swapHelper is trusted.
ERC721Upgradeable wrapper with staking; constructor disables initializers; has receive() that wraps native to WNATIVE.
Oracle reader for Api3; constructor disables initializers.
Non-upgradeable OZ AccessControlDefaultAdminRules; central role authority.
Non-upgradeable swap helper; holds allowances to router; callable by anyone.
Non-upgradeable interest rate model with immutable parameters.
Non-upgradeable helper with infinite approve in constructor.
